|desc = {{p|Reshiram}} is N's only known Pokémon. It appeared when N tried to stop Ghetsis from freezing Unova with {{p|Kyurem}}'s power. Reshiram battled with Kyurem, but thanks to the [[DNA Splicers]], Reshiram ended up getting fused with Kyurem which resulted in it becoming White Kyurem.

Reshiram's known moves are {{m|Fusion Flare}} and {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
